$comment: EVES-003 profile of ERC-721 token metadata. Base fields (name, description, image) from the ERC-721 Metadata JSON Schema (EIP-721). Display fields (animation_url, external_url, background_color, attributes) from OpenSea Metadata Standards (de facto, no upstream schema). EVES extension fields (minter, creators, contributors, publishers, date, type, language, rights, rights_uri, identifier, formats) mirror TZIP-21 for cross-chain interoperability.

name.description: Identifies the asset that this NFT represents.

description.description: Describes the asset that this NFT represents.

image.description: A URI pointing to a resource with mime type image/* representing the asset. Maps to TZIP-21 displayUri.

animation_url.description: A URI pointing to the actual asset content (for example, asset.zip download URL). Maps to TZIP-21 artifactUri.

external_url.description: A URI pointing to an external page with additional information about the asset (for example, domain metadata on IPFS). Maps to TZIP-21 externalUri.

background_color.description: Background color of the item on OpenSea. Must be a six-character hexadecimal without a pre-pended #.

minter.description: The DID of the LegalEntity (OrganizationParticipant) responsible for minting the asset, as defined in EVES-008 (for example, did:ethr:<chainIdHex>:<address>). EVES extension.

creators.description: The primary person, people, or organization(s) responsible for creating the intellectual content of the asset.

contributors.description: The person, people, or organization(s) that have made substantial creative contributions to the asset.

publishers.description: The person, people, or organization(s) primarily responsible for distributing or making the asset available to others in its present form.

date.description: A date associated with the creation or availability of the asset.

type.description: A broad definition of the type of content of the asset.

language.description: The language of the intellectual content of the asset as defined in RFC 1766. EVES extension.

rights.description: A statement about the asset rights, for example, an SPDX license identifier.

rights_uri.description: Links to a statement of rights (for example, full license text or smart contract DID). Maps to TZIP-21 rightsUri. EVES extension.

identifier.description: A string or number used to uniquely identify the asset. Ex. URL, URN, UUID, ISBN, DID, etc.

attributes.description: OpenSea-style attributes describing traits of the asset.

uri.description: A URI to the asset represented in this format.

hash.description: A checksum hash of the content of the asset in this format.

fileSize.description: Size in bytes of the content of the asset in this format.

fileName.description: Filename for the asset in this format. For display purposes.

duration.description: Time duration of the content of the asset in this format.

dimensions.description: Dimensions of the content of the asset in this format.

dataRate.description: Data rate which the content of the asset in this format was captured at.

display_type.description: Display type hint for the trait (for example, number, boost_percentage, boost_number, date).
